as inference provider. No GPU needed, no Azure OpenAI complexity.

feat: add PR requirements for link submissions

- CONTRIBUTING.md: format guide, 7 category table, CI explanation,
  maintainer setup note for required status checks

  5-item checklist (file, format, duplicate, accessibility, description)

  403/429 responses are warnings not hard failures (bot-blocking sites)

  (format-check, url-check) on PRs to main touching wiki/**

commit.message:
fix: test-bridged 2-hop graph expansion for cross-file chains

When a test file ranks in the top-10 and connects via graph to a
non-test source file (hop1), that source file is now expanded one
further hop. Recovers cross-file chains like:
  prompt-builder.test.ts → prompt-builder.ts → orchestrator.ts

Targeted design: only fires on test→source paths, avoiding the
scope leaks that occur with unrestricted depth=2 expansion.

Also: extracted isTestFile() as a private class method so both
processRawResults and expandWithGraphNeighbors share the same logic.

Tests: 712/712 passing (+1 new test for test-bridged 2-hop case)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat(api): add request retries & fix(container): Error on failing to get published apps (#41)

**API Retries:**
([AB#4708](https://dev.azure.com/cc-ppi/83f75d99-795d-45dc-8543-9fe1918ff7f9/_workitems/edit/4708))

* Added `$Retries` and `$NoRetryStatusCodes` parameters to
`Invoke-AlpacaApiRequest`, implementing exponential backoff and skipping
retries for specific HTTP status codes.
* Updated all module functions that call `Invoke-AlpacaApiRequest` (such
as `Get-AlpacaAppInfo`, `Get-AlpacaConfigSyncStatus`,
`Get-AlpacaDependencyApps`, `New-AlpacaContainer`,
`Remove-AlpacaContainer`, `Sync-AlpacaConfigs`,
`Wait-AlpacaContainerImageReady`) to use the new retry functionality,
typically with 3 retries.
[[1]](diffhunk://#diff-47612468828038e919c91067c0f6a941f56de6802d0945fce23ae0b256d0c463L14-R14)
[[2]](diffhunk://#diff-c66b366d7a80f0d6e7e1d3684067900a005e79366e8c3819f75f85c2eac0c0d9L12-R12)
[[3]](diffhunk://#diff-676c982eb1f3b2eec8c6d5713156adab85d75a5506cf5b2cd7bdb848c73cfb09L32-R32)
[[4]](diffhunk://#diff-73198a54cf38fb6e89441675dea6390f6639451dbd304cb25bef345a727e0edaL45-R45)
[[5]](diffhunk://#diff-5a3470d7c24b460e3d5ff91dec89cc62eebbae894452117fcf6af6ccae56d68bL21-R21)
[[6]](diffhunk://#diff-652cfd2ef00a4980d390638aa36af9a79160bd63d29e954233c03f27b1d44fa1L18-R18)
[[7]](diffhunk://#diff-5a3325e25f9937282b863bd9efb664c4fc06e3338f050b4b726e7f3ff6adfe88L36-R36)

**Retrieving published App:**
([AB#4656](https://dev.azure.com/cc-ppi/83f75d99-795d-45dc-8543-9fe1918ff7f9/_workitems/edit/4656))

* Removed try/catch for retrieving published apps to throw possible
errors and stop the workflow
* Improved variable initialization for published apps

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: tighten package.json loadPath behavior and improve path error messages

- Only read varlock config from package.json in cwd, not parent directories
- Validate loadPath early with targeted errors distinguishing --path flag vs package.json source
- Differentiate "path not found", "no env files found", and "no config items defined" errors, each showing the relevant path
- Add smoke test fixture and tests for package.json loadPath config
- Clarify docs that directory paths auto-load all .env files; file paths only load that file

overlay components. Replace with Tailwind native border utility which
always renders correctly.

UiContextMenuContent, UiContextMenuSubContent, UiDialogContent,
UiAlertDialogContent, UiHoverCardContent, UiCommand, UiSelect (content),

commit.message:
fix(theme): fix dynamic border opacity reactivity and App.vue import

- Introduce --border-hsl and --input-hsl intermediary vars in :root and .dark
- Define --border and --input only in :root using var(--border-hsl) so CSS
  lazy evaluation keeps opacity reactive when --ui-border-opacity changes via JS
- Remove --border and --input from .dark (they cascade with correct dark base)
- Fix App.vue: import use3dfConfig from @3df-spa/ui (not @3df/ui) to share
  the correct singleton config ref with all 3df components

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix(theme): replace color-mix with hsl alpha for border opacity

color-mix(gray, transparent) darkens color toward black, making borders
invisible on dark backgrounds. Replace with hsl(h s l / opacity) which
correctly controls only the alpha channel.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: improve live market outcome detection and filtering

Changes:
- Filter souvenirs from inputs (they can NEVER be trade-up inputs)
- Use live market data for outcome detection (more reliable than static DB)
- Fall back to static DB if needed
- Fix outcome price fetching using actual listing prices
- Improved outcome price discovery: prioritize live listings over API

Testing:
- Mock mode: 3 trade-ups found with correct outcomes (46-47% ROI)
- Live mode: Market data processed correctly, filters applied
- Outcomes correctly detected from live data
- 145 tradable inputs + 75 unique outputs identified

Next steps:
- Live market currently has no profitable trade-ups (price volatility)
- System is working correctly and reliably
- Ready for continuous monitoring

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: use static collection database for reliable trade-up outcomes

- Created collections.py with static Collection -> Rarity -> Items mapping
- Replaces unreliable API-based outcome discovery
- Ensures correct outcomes regardless of current market listings
- Fixes souvenir detection issues
- Mock mode now produces reliable, predictable results

Trade-up outcomes are now ALWAYS correct:
- AK-47 | Redline (R2) → 2 outputs (50% each)
- Glock-18 | Fade (R2) → 2 outputs (50% each)
- MP9 | Hot Rod (R1) → 2 outputs (50% each)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: build complete Linx MERN academic collaboration platform

- Express/Node.js backend with JWT auth, rate limiting, CORS
- MongoDB models: User, Project, Job, Activity, Message
- Full CRUD controllers for auth, users, projects, jobs, activities
- Socket.io real-time: activity feed, project rooms, presence tracking
- Academic email verification (.edu, .ac.uk, .edu.in, etc.)
- GitHub integration for skill extraction
- React 18 + Vite frontend with Tailwind CSS
- Glassmorphism UI with Framer Motion animations
- Zustand auth store with localStorage persistence
- Landing page with hero, stats, features, testimonials
- Dashboard (bento grid), Projects, Jobs, Alumni, Profile pages
- Reusable components: Button, Card, Navbar, Footer, modals
- useAuth, useSocket, useGitHub custom hooks
- Axios API service with auth interceptors
- Socket.io client service
- SETUP.md and updated README.md

commit.message:
feat: Support dashboard resources auto-downloading (issue #985) (#1062)

* Initial plan

* feat: add dashboard auto-download support (external-ui-url config)

Co-authored-by: ibigbug <543405+ibigbug@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: IPv6 literals fail in direct outbound when dns.ipv6 is disabled (#1063)

* fix(tun): use async sleep to wait for TUN interface visibility before route setup (#1060)

* Initial plan

* fix(tun): wait for tun visibility using async sleep before adding routes

Fixes #1032 - intermittent TUN startup crash "tun interface not found".

After build_async() creates a new TUN device, the interface may not be
immediately visible via NetworkInterface::show(). This caused maybe_add_routes()
to call get_interface_by_name() -> None -> .expect() -> panic (SIGABRT).

Changes:
- Add Clone derive to TunConfig (config/internal/config.rs)
- Replace .expect("tun interface not found") with proper error return in
  maybe_add_routes (routes/mod.rs)
- Make new_internal an async associated function taking &TunConfig; add
  retry loop (up to 40x50ms = 2s) using tokio::time::sleep (not
  std::thread::sleep which blocks Tokio runtime) to wait for TUN
  interface visibility before calling maybe_add_routes (runner.rs)
- Update run_async to clone cfg and await new_internal inside tokio::spawn

Co-authored-by: ibigbug <543405+ibigbug@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(tun): address review comments - fix poll loop and surface NetworkInterface errors

- Restructure TUN visibility poll loop to avoid sleeping after the
  last attempt, eliminating false-negative window where interface
  becomes visible during the final sleep but still errors
- Capture NetworkInterface::show() errors and include the last error
  message in the Error::Operation return for better diagnostics
- Fix fmt/clippy issues in runner.rs

Co-authored-by: ibigbug <543405+ibigbug@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(tun): fix nightly fmt - adjust line break in format string

Co-authored-by: ibigbug <543405+ibigbug@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: copilot-swe-agent[bot] <198982749+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: ibigbug <543405+ibigbug@users.noreply.github.com>

* feature: support vless reality (#1057)

* feat: support inbound provider (#1066)

* feat: allow proxy groups/providers as outbounds for DNS and geo-data downloads (#1061)

* style: fix cargo fmt formatting in dashboard module

* feat: use proxy-aware HTTP client for dashboard download
